agents.task_title: Full matrix verification + Phase 5 verification doc
acceptance_criteria: Run chiseledBuild on all 5 MC versions and verify BUILD SUCCESSFUL
Run chiseledTest on all 5 MC versions and verify all JUnit tests pass (including 7 new AcquisitionCatalogTest tests)
Run chiseledRunGametest on all 5 MC versions and verify 16/16 tests pass per version
Create verification doc with results table, status (GREEN or HOLD), artifact summary, test deltas, and optional git tag command
If all 5 versions GREEN: apply git tag 'phase-5-acquisition' and push
If any version RED: leave tag unapplied, document failure in Known issues section, update Status to HOLD
Commit verification doc with message 'phase 5: final verification doc'
